data.title: Timing The Market? Here Are America's Next 10 Boomtowns
X Elevates 'Largely Underserved Public Conversation' On Cannabis, Supports Industry Growth, Engagement
data.description: X, formerly known as Twitter, now allows cannabis advertising. Alexa Alianiello, X's lead for cannabis sales, discusses its impact and future vision.

data.title: Nasdaq Sees Recurring Revenue Soar 31% In Q3, Solutions Rake In $872M
data.description: Nasdaq reports 3Q revenue of $1.15B, missing analyst estimate. Adjusted EPS of $0.74 beats estimate. ARR increases 31%. Stock price falls.

data.title: T-Mobile Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Strong Earnings
Jobless Claims Fall More Than Expected, Continuing Benefits Surge To Nearly 3-Year Highs: Labor Market At 'Full Employment,' Analyst Says
data.description: US labor market shows strength with jobless claims falling sharply, indicating robust job market as presidential elections approach.
